creator: freebsd-ssa@mailden.net
text: Exact same issue when trying to install freeBSD on a brand new Lenovo E480. I tried `FreeBSD-12.0-CURRENT-amd64-20180322-r331345` and `FreeBSD-11.1-STABLE-amd64-20180322-r331337`. Both failed with continuously logging nvme0 failure. Help welcome ! I can provide more information if needed.
